parameters.name: springk
parameters.label: Spring Constant
parameters.description: The strength of the spring. Larger spring constants produce higher frequency oscillations.

parameters.name: mass
parameters.label: Mass
parameters.description: The mass of the object on the end of the spring. Higher masses will produce lower frequency oscillations, have higher amplitudes, and be more resistant to damping.

parameters.name: dampingk
parameters.label: Damping Constant
parameters.description: The amount of damping (resistance) applied to the spring action. Higher damping causes oscillations to die off more quickly.

parameters.name: method
parameters.label: Input Effect
parameters.description: Determines whether the input channel(s) represents a position or a force.

parameters.name: condfromchan
parameters.label: Intial Conditions from Channel
parameters.description: If On, the initial position and velocity are calculated from the values at the beginning of the channel.

parameters.name: initpos
parameters.label: Initial Position
parameters.description: The initial position of the mass attached to the spring.

parameters.name: initspeed
parameters.label: Initial Speed
parameters.description: The initial velocity of the mass attached to the spring.

parameters.name: reset
parameters.label: Reset
parameters.description: While On resets the spring effect of the .

parameters.name: timeslice
parameters.label: Time Slice
parameters.description: Turning this on forces the channels to be " ".  A is the time between the last cook frame and the current cook frame.

parameters.name: scope
parameters.label: Scope
parameters.description: To determine which channels get affected, some CHOPs use a string on the Common page. See .

parameters.name: srselect
parameters.label: Sample Rate Match
parameters.description: Handle cases where multiple input CHOPs' sample rates are different. When Resampling occurs, the curves are interpolated according to the Interpolation Method Option, or "Linear" if the Interpolate Op

parameters.name: exportmethod
parameters.label: Export Method
parameters.description: This will determine how to connect the channel to the parameter. Refer to the article for more information.

parameters.name: autoexportroot
parameters.label: Export Root
parameters.description: This path points to the root node where all of the paths that exporting by are relative to.

parameters.name: exporttable
parameters.label: Export Table
parameters.description: The used to hold the export information when using the Table Methods (See above).

examples.label: Configure Time Slice and Spring Constant
examples.code:
n = op('spring1')
n.par.timeslice = True
n.par.springk = 10
n.par.dampingk = 3
examples.description: Common settings from 7 real Derivative examples
